teaching.finishToMark: You have to finish the video to mark it as watched. You can pause whenever you need to.
teaching.loadError: We couldn't load the video right now. Reload the page or contact us if the problem persists.
teaching.videoPending: Video pending upload (no mux_playback_id on this section).
teaching.skipBlockedToast: To mark it as watched, you need to watch the video without skipping ahead.
teaching.playerErrorToast: There was a problem loading the video. Reload the page to try again.

activation.notOpenYet: Submission is enabled when you reach the week of this module.
activation.placeholder: Write your activation here. Take it seriously — Dr. Max will review your submission and return personal feedback within 48 hours.
activation.tooShortToast: Your submission is too short. Write at least 20 characters.
activation.pendingTitle: Dr. Max is reviewing your submission
activation.pendingBody: Your correction arrives 48 hours after your submission. We'll email you as soon as it's ready.
activation.windowClosedBody: You didn't complete this activation within the week ({opens} → {closes}). The content remains accessible for review. To get certified for the block you'll need to reopen this assignment — contact the team if you want to catch up.

quiz.answerAllToast: Answer all the questions before submitting.
quiz.receivedToast: Received. Your result will be available in 48h.
quiz.pendingTitle: Received. Your result is under review.
quiz.pendingBody: DAP quizzes are delivered 48 hours after submission. This gives you space to absorb what you've learned without the anxiety of an immediate result.
quiz.whileWaiting: While you wait, you can review the teaching or move on to other content in the module {quizNote}.
quiz.failedMessage: You haven't reached the threshold yet. Review the explanations and try again.
quiz.outOfAttempts: You've used up your attempts. Contact the team if you think this is an error.
